themes.label: Obedience
themes.summary: This chapter stresses hearing, keeping, following, or walking in God’s commands. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Ye shall do my judgments, and keep mine ordinances, to walk therein: I am the LORD your God....". Word-study detail reinforces "חֻקֹּתַי֙: my statutes - a statute".

themes.label: Presence
themes.summary: This chapter highlights God’s nearness, abiding presence, indwelling, or covenant companionship. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 5 verses. Commentary leans on "Thou shalt not uncover the nakedness of thy mother's sister: for she is thy mother's near kin...". Word-study detail reinforces "אֶל: - near, with or among; often in general, to".

themes.label: Judgment
themes.summary: This chapter addresses wrath, judgment, condemnation, justice, or divine reckoning. Local Strong’s word study and cross references data reinforce this reading across 4 verses. Commentary leans on "How does this verse help you understand both God's justice and His mercy in salvation?". Cross references echo "Judgment".

4: You shall observe My judgments and keep My ordinances
5: You shall therefore keep My statutes and My judgments
26: You shall therefore keep My statutes and My judgments

themes.label: New Birth
themes.summary: This chapter emphasizes regeneration, new life, spiritual birth, or becoming God’s children.
